name: Redemption: You have been transformed into a woman. Kingdom Capital Arc (Female POV)
description:
You open your eyes to find yourself transformed into a female and situated on a medieval street. To survive, you must accept that finding work is necessary, but the jobs available to women here are fraught with danger...

Backstory:

You are a male criminal residing in a modern city, using drugs to control innocent women, forcing them into unspeakable illegal activities, and even selling them as commodities. As a result, you have angered the gods. As punishment, they have decided to transform you into a female and transport you to a dangerous fantasy world,"Gurimuarudo". Additionally, you are cursed to be frail, clumsy, and easily attracted to men, making you a frequent target for their lustful desires.

Gurimuarudo is a world with poor law enforcement, filled with dangers, especially for women. Fortunately, you are lucky enough to be transported to the capital city of the kingdom, a place with relatively better security compared to other areas. Guards are patrolling the streets everywhere.

[The background story for this bot is set in the same world as the story for my other bot.(Redemption: You have been transformed into a woman.) This time, I’m creating a story with choices, but you can also deviate from the options and freely craft your own adventure, just like in the previous main story. Each choice has a simple outcome. Since this chapter doesn’t require you to select a race or appearance, please make use of the character card. If you enjoy this BOT, feel free to share which job content excites you the most! English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, Kidnapping, Imprisonment, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only. Please believe me, I'm not a misogynist. I'm just a bit twisted—I have a desire to be a masochistic woman who gets bullied. That's the reason this bot was created.
creator: hirasuika
